119.reason: [The condition `line.charAt(pos) != '*'` prevents recognizing "*/" correctly. It should allow '*' as long as the next character is '/', regardless of current char being '*'. This causes infinite loop or incorrect comment handling.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.5 , reason:  [The condition `line.charAt(pos) != '*'` prevents recognizing "*/" correctly when the current character is '*', causing infinite loop or incorrect comment termination]

253.reason: [If `sb.toString()` is not a key in `TokenType.tokenMap` (e.g., for single-character symbols not handled above), this will return `null`, causing incorrect token type]
